notes: B4G4-TC176: As Admin, walked ORD-019 through full lifecycle using only action buttons: Draft->Submit for Approval->Approve->Start Production->Complete Production->Mark Complete. API confirmed final status 'completed'. All action buttons work correctly.

B4G4-TC177: As Admin on ORD-005, performed quality hold loop: Quality Check->Quality Hold->Quality Check->Quality Hold->Quality Check. All 4 transitions succeeded via action buttons with page reload between each. Status sequence confirmed: quality_hold -> quality_check -> quality_hold -> quality_check.

B4G4-TC178: Full reject-resubmit flow: Admin submitted ORD-024, rejected it (back to draft). Operator logged in, resubmitted ORD-024. Admin logged in, approved. API confirmed final status 'approved'. Multi-role workflow works correctly.

B4G4-TC179: As Operator, opened Draft order ORD-025 detail. Clicked 'Submit for Approval'. Status changed to 'submitted'. Activity log shows 'Status changed from draft to submitted' with USR-003 attribution and timestamp. Verified on Workflows page - card in Submitted column.

B4G4-TC180: Orders distributed across multiple status columns. API shows orders in: submitted(3), approved(8), in_production(6), completed(8), quality_check(2), quality_hold(1). No draft orders remain (consumed during testing). Seed data was initially distributed across Draft, Submitted, Approved, In Production, Quality Check, Quality Hold, and Completed columns.
B4G4-TC181: Approved ORD-025 as Admin. Success toast displayed: 'Order approve successful'. Notification shows transition action.

B4G4-TC182: Attempted invalid drag ORD-026 Draft->Completed. Card remained in Draft column (API confirmed status='draft'). Invalid transition was rejected. Toast may have been dismissed before capture but API rejection confirmed.

B4G4-TC183: As Admin, performed 3 transitions on ORD-026: Draft->Submitted->Approved->In Production. Opened detail, verified activity log shows exactly 4 entries (creation + 3 transitions) in correct chronological order: 'Order created' (USR-003), 'draft to submitted' (USR-001), 'submitted to approved' (USR-001), 'approved to in_production' (USR-001). Timestamps correct.

B4G4-TC184: As Supervisor, created order ORD-029, submitted it, then approved via action button. Activity log shows: 'Status changed from submitted to approved' with USR-002 (Supervisor) attribution, timestamp 3/15/2026, 6:30:32 PM, and correct from/to statuses.

B4G4-TC185: As Admin on Workflows, performed 2 rapid transitions (ORD-027 Draft->Submitted, ORD-028 Draft->Submitted). Both produced separate success notifications that stacked: 'ORD-027: Draft -> Submitted' and 'ORD-028: Draft -> Submitted'. Notifications displayed without overwriting each other.

B4G4-TC186: As Operator, created new order ORD-030. Opened detail page. Clicked 'Submit for Approval'. Status changed to 'submitted'. Navigated to Workflows, verified card appears in Submitted column.
B4G4-TC187: As Admin, dragged ORD-007 from Quality Hold toward Approved column. API confirmed ORD-007 remained in 'quality_hold' status. Invalid transition correctly rejected.

B4G4-TC188: Verified Kanban accessible by all roles. Logged in as Admin, Supervisor, and Operator sequentially. All three roles could navigate to /workflows and see 'Workflows' heading. Kanban board rendered for all roles.
B4G4-TC189: Skipped - dropping card outside columns requires precise mouse coordinate manipulation that cannot be reliably tested via headless drag-and-drop.

B4G4-TC190: As Operator, dragged ORD-027 from Submitted toward Approved. API returned 403 Forbidden. Card returned to Submitted column (API confirmed status='submitted'). Role-enforcement failure correctly rolls back card position.
B4G4-TC191: As Admin, navigated to /settings. Page loaded successfully showing 'Settings' heading. Admin has full access to Settings page.
B4G4-TC192: As Supervisor, navigated to /settings. Redirected to Dashboard (URL changed to /). Supervisor cannot access Settings.
B4G4-TC193: As Operator, navigated to /settings. Redirected to Dashboard (URL changed to /). Operator cannot access Settings.

B4G4-TC194: As Supervisor, navigated to /settings. Toast notification displayed 'Access denied' with error styling. Previously marked FAIL in test plan but now PASSING - access denied notification is correctly shown on redirect.
B4G4-TC195: As Admin on Settings page, Users tab is selected by default. Table renders with columns: Name, Email, Role, Actions. Table contains data rows with user information.

B4G4-TC196: As Admin, clicked 'Add User'. Filled form: name='Test User B4', email='testb4@factory.local', role=operator, password='test123'. Saved. User appeared in table (6 rows). Edited user name to 'Test User B4 Updated'. Saved. Updated name reflected in table.
B4G4-TC197: Users table shows 5 seed users: Admin, Jan Novak (supervisor), Petra Svoboda (operator), Tomas Dvorak (operator), Eva Kralova (supervisor). Count confirmed via table row count.

B4G4-TC198: Clicked 'Add User' button. Modal dialog 'Add User' opened with fields: Name (text), Email (text), Role (dropdown with admin/supervisor/operator options), Password (text). Save and Cancel buttons present.

B4G4-TC199: As Admin, created user 'Test User B4' (appeared in table, 6 rows). Then deleted the user via Delete button + Confirm dialog. User removed from table (back to 5 rows). Success notification shown.
B4G4-TC200: Clicked 'Add User', left all fields empty, clicked Save. Server returned 400 Bad Request. Form remained open (validation prevented submission). Required fields validation working.
